title: Interpret AGV Flow Through the Charger Module
summary: Use the training material for the charger module to interpret the expected AGV sequence through charger entrance queue, tote drop-off, charging without a tote, tote pickup when applicable, and exit queue.
when_to_use: Use this reference when reviewing the charger module training diagram or observing AGV movement to compare actual charger-area behavior against the documented sequence described in the training source.
not_for: Do not use this as a charging control procedure.
Do not use this source alone to infer charger fault causes.
Do not use this source alone to define recovery actions.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the charger module training material and compare observed AGV movement to the documented charger flow.

safety_notes: This candidate is an interpretation aid derived from training narration and slide content, not an operational charging control procedure.
Do not infer charger fault causes or recovery actions from this training segment alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the training slide or diagram for the charger module
Ability to observe AGV position relative to charger entrance queue, tote locations, pickup, and exit queue

access_required: Access to the UPSFORTNA OptiSweep Training Day 1 charger module training material
system_preconditions: Charger module layout or observed AGV movement is available for comparison

visual_references.description: Training slide/frame showing modular charger flow with entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup, and exit queue.

steps.title: Identify charger flow locations on the training diagram
steps.purpose: Establish the charger-module reference points used to interpret AGV movement.
steps.instruction: Locate the charger portion of the modularization diagram or training material and identify the entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup location, and exit queue.
steps.expected_result: The charger flow locations are identifiable on the source material.
steps.healthy_condition: The diagram or frame clearly supports identifying charger entrance queue, tote locations, pickup, and exit queue.
steps.failure_condition: The charger flow locations cannot be confidently identified from the available source material.

actions.label: Review charger diagram
actions.exact_action: Locate the charger portion of the modularization diagram or training material and identify the entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup location, and exit queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Charger area labels and flow elements showing entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup, and exit queue.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the charger movement reference points cannot be identified from the source material.

source_evidence.text: Locate the charger portion of the modularization diagram or training material and identify the entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup location, and exit queue.
Training slide showing the modularized flow between tipper, hospital, and charger areas using entrance queues, exit queues, and tote pickup/drop-off locations.

Transcript says the charger has an entrance queue and tote locations where an AGV drops off its tote before charging, does not like to charge with totes on it, then picks up the tote and goes to the exit queue.

steps.title: Confirm charger entry through the entrance queue
steps.purpose: Verify the documented first movement into the charger module.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the AGV enters the charger through the entrance queue.
steps.expected_result: The AGV path into the charger is interpreted as entering through the entrance queue.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed or diagrammed charger entry aligns with the entrance queue shown in the source.
steps.failure_condition: Observed charger entry does not align with the documented entrance queue sequence.

actions.label: Check charger entry path
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the AGV enters the charger through the entrance queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charger entrance queue and the AGV approach path into the charger module.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented entrance queue sequence.

source_evidence.text: Confirm that the AGV enters the charger through the entrance queue.
Transcript states 'we've got your entrance queue' and charger flow includes an entrance queue.
Charger flow includes an entrance queue, tote drop-off while charging, tote pickup after charging, and an exit queue.

steps.title: Verify tote drop-off before charging
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented tote-handling step that occurs before charging.
steps.instruction: Verify that the AGV drops off its tote at the tote location before charging.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is interpreted as dropping off its tote before charging.
steps.healthy_condition: The source-supported sequence shows tote drop-off occurring before the charging step.
steps.failure_condition: Observed or interpreted flow skips tote drop-off before charging when the source indicates it should occur.

actions.label: Check tote drop-off sequence
actions.exact_action: Verify that the AGV drops off its tote at the tote location before charging.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote drop-off locations in the charger module and their position before the charging step.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented tote drop-off before charging.

source_evidence.text: Verify that the AGV drops off its tote at the tote location before charging.
Transcript says the charger has an entrance queue and tote locations where an AGV drops off its tote before charging.
Charger flow includes tote drop-off while charging.

steps.title: Confirm charging occurs without a tote
steps.purpose: Validate the source statement about expected AGV charging condition.
steps.instruction: Check that the AGV charges without a tote on it, consistent with the source statement that it does not like to charge with totes on it.
steps.expected_result: The charging state is interpreted as occurring without a tote on the AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The source-supported flow shows the AGV charging after tote drop-off and without a tote on it.
steps.failure_condition: Observed or interpreted charging behavior includes charging with a tote when the source indicates the AGV does not like to charge with totes on it.

actions.label: Check no-tote charging condition
actions.exact_action: Check that the AGV charges without a tote on it, consistent with the source statement that it does not like to charge with totes on it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charger flow sequence showing tote drop-off before charging and pickup after charging.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented no-tote charging sequence.

source_evidence.text: Check that the AGV charges without a tote on it, consistent with the source statement that it does not like to charge with totes on it.
Transcript says the AGV does not like to charge with totes on it.
The charger module in training video segment 0020 includes charging without a tote on the AGV.

steps.title: Verify tote pickup after charging
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented post-charge tote-handling step.
steps.instruction: After charging, verify that the AGV goes to pick up its tote.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is interpreted as returning to tote pickup after charging.
steps.healthy_condition: The source-supported sequence shows tote pickup after charging.
steps.failure_condition: Observed or interpreted flow does not include tote pickup after charging when applicable.

actions.label: Check post-charge tote pickup
actions.exact_action: After charging, verify that the AGV goes to pick up its tote.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The tote pickup location and its position after the charging step.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented tote pickup after charging.

source_evidence.text: After charging, verify that the AGV goes to pick up its tote.
Transcript says the AGV picks up the tote after charging.
Charger flow includes tote pickup after charging.

steps.title: Apply the shutdown-state tote exception
steps.purpose: Account for the source-noted exception to the normal tote pickup sequence.
steps.instruction: In a shutdown state, note the source exception that some AGVs may not have totes and therefore do not need the tote pickup step.
steps.expected_result: Shutdown-state observations are interpreted with the tote exception in mind.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs without totes in shutdown are recognized as not requiring the tote pickup step.
steps.failure_condition: A shutdown-state AGV without a tote is incorrectly treated as missing a required tote pickup step.

actions.label: Check shutdown exception
actions.exact_action: In a shutdown state, note the source exception that some AGVs may not have totes and therefore do not need the tote pickup step.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charger flow context while applying the shutdown-state exception for AGVs without totes.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if shutdown-state charger movement cannot be reconciled with the source-noted tote exception.

source_evidence.text: In a shutdown state, note the source exception that some AGVs may not have totes and therefore do not need the tote pickup step.
Transcript notes shutdown-state behavior and that charger flow includes tote pickup after charging, with some AGVs possibly not having totes.

steps.title: Confirm exit through the charger exit queue
steps.purpose: Verify the documented final movement out of the charger module.
steps.instruction: Confirm that after charging and any tote pickup, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is interpreted as leaving the charger through the exit queue.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed or diagrammed charger flow ends at the exit queue after charging and any applicable tote pickup.
steps.failure_condition: Observed charger movement does not align with the documented exit queue sequence.

actions.label: Check charger exit path
actions.exact_action: Confirm that after charging and any tote pickup, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charger exit queue and the final AGV path after charging and any tote pickup.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented exit queue sequence.

source_evidence.text: Confirm that after charging and any tote pickup, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.
Transcript says the AGV picks up the tote and goes to the exit queue.
Charger flow includes an exit queue.

success_criteria: The user can trace the documented charger-module sequence from entrance queue to exit queue.
Observed AGV movement can be compared against the source-described sequence of tote drop-off, charging without a tote, tote pickup when applicable, and exit.
healthy_conditions: AGV enters through the charger entrance queue.
AGV drops off its tote before charging.
AGV charges without a tote on it.
AGV picks up its tote after charging when applicable.
AGV proceeds to the charger exit queue after charging and any applicable tote pickup.
Shutdown-state observations account for AGVs that may not have totes.
failure_conditions: Observed charger movement does not match the documented entrance, tote drop-off, charging, tote pickup when applicable, and exit sequence.
The source material is insufficient to confidently identify charger flow locations.
The user attempts to infer charger fault causes or recovery actions from this training segment alone.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if observed charger movement does not match the documented entrance, tote drop-off, charging, tote pickup when applicable, and exit sequence.
Escalate for SME review if charger behavior appears inconsistent with the training reference and additional operational guidance is needed.
Do not infer charger fault causes or recovery actions from this training segment alone.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall charger module flow including entrance queue, tote drop-off locations, tote pickup, and exit queue.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Transcript says the charger has an entrance queue and tote locations where an AGV drops off its tote before charging, does not like to charge with totes on it, then picks up the tote and goes to the exit queue.

missing_details: The source does not provide a formal charging control procedure.
The source does not define fault causes, recovery actions, or troubleshooting commands for charger issues.
The source does not specify timing expectations for each charger flow step.
The source does not define role boundaries beyond operator-level interpretation use.
